Download EhViewer APK — Free Manga Reader for Android

Ready to Start Reading?

Download EhViewer APK

Every great manga journey begins with a single chapter. EhViewer is a free, open-source reader with Material Design 3 and Dynamic Color — no signup, no ads, no tracking. Install in under a minute.

iOS

Coming Soon

Version 1.14.6Released Dec 17, 2025Android 8.0+License GPLv3

Release 1.14.6 · Dec 17, 2025

What's new in EhViewer

A modern EhViewer fork built by passionate contributors, tuned for high performance with Material Design 3 and Dynamic Color support.

New features

  • Display gallery reading progress, enabled in EH settings (#2277)

Improvements

  • Redisplay the hover action button when the gallery list changes (#2681)
  • Remove trailing spaces and dots from filenames for Windows compatibility (#2727)
  • Long-pressing a tag in the gallery details now shows the tag name (#2769)
  • Miscellaneous optimization

Bug fixes

  • Fixed misaligned drop-down menu inside dialog boxes
  • Fixed HTTP status errors being shown as "Nothing found"
  • Some older devices could not pass Cloudflare verification (#2794)
  • Miscellaneous repairs

Android

Download EhViewer for Android

Pick a build to download EhViewer for Android and settle in for your next binge-reading arc — smooth, uninterrupted manga reading awaits.

* Devices running Android 6 need the ISRG Root X1 certificate installed.

Flavors & compatibility

FlavorMin AndroidNotes
Default8.0Animated WebP support requires Android 9+.
Ehviewer_CN_SX8.0Simultaneous translation from German, Spanish, French, Korean, Thai, Japanese and Traditional Chinese.
Marshmallow6.0*Limited support, no guarantees.

* Devices running Android 6 need the ISRG Root X1 certificate installed.

System Requirements (Android)

  • Android 6.0 or newer
  • Quad-core 2.0 GHz (or higher)
  • 1 GB RAM and above recommended
  • 1+ GB storage needed
  • 720px+ display

Installation Guide (Android)

  1. 1Visit Ehviewer.app
  2. 2Hit the download button
  3. 3Download the APK first
  4. 4Head to Settings → Security → Unknown sources
  5. 5Hit the install button
  6. 6Launch EhViewer from your home screen and enjoy

Marshmallow build

Android 6 (Marshmallow) downloads

Legacy builds for older devices. Limited support, no guarantees.

* Devices running Android 6 need the ISRG Root X1 certificate installed.

For developers

Mapping, debug symbols & source

Mapping & debug symbols

Source code

iOS / iPhone

EhViewer for iOS

Launching Soon

EhViewer for iOS is on its way. Read manga on your iPhone or iPad shortly.

System Requirements (iOS)

  • iOS 10 or higher
  • Portrait orientation lock turned off
  • Background app refresh turned on
  • Low Power Mode turned off
  • iPhone 6 or above

Installation Guide (iOS)

  1. 1Visit the EhViewer official website
  2. 2Hit the download button
  3. 3Allow your iPhone to accept the profile
  4. 4Open the Settings app
  5. 5Navigate to the Profile Download section
  6. 6Tap Install
  7. 7Enter your passcode and tap Next
  8. 8Tap the Install link again
  9. 9Launch EhViewer from your home screen and enjoy
EhViewer

EhViewer — a free, open-source manga reader for Android — iOS coming soon — built by the community.
